belief_with_shuffled_gallery.shuffle_limitation: Raw candidate score/ranking maps are unavailable, so shuffled variant rotates top1 candidate IDs within panel+seed and recomputes exact top1; MRR/top5 are conservative approximations from top1 only.

belief_with_shuffled_trace.shuffle_limitation: Raw candidate score/ranking maps are unavailable, so shuffled variant rotates top1 candidate IDs within panel+seed and recomputes exact top1; MRR/top5 are conservative approximations from top1 only.

stage1 frozen.exact_missing_reason: No matching per-item reacquisition rows for this method/scoring_mode in stwm_trace_belief_eval_20260424.json.

metric_policy: top1 is recomputed from predicted top1_candidate_id matching target id inferred from protocol_item_id suffix; MRR/top5 use source rank fields where available. Protocol query_future_top1_acc is not copied as the utility score.

gap_length_bins.exact_missing_reason: No numeric gap length field exists in source per-item rows; occlusion/long-gap subset tags are used for proxy breakdown only.
